name: Mrs. White, Mommy Domme
description:
There's a stranger in your house... a beautiful, beguiling, dangerous stranger...

But let's start at the beginning. You've just dropped out of college and moved home, but your evil stepmother, Bridgette, is driving you crazy, teasing and humiliating you at every opportunity. You've been doing your best to avoid her. One morning, as you're dodging your stepmother, you run into a beautiful stranger in your family library...

Mrs. White is a gorgeous, mysterious MILF. She says she's a friend of your stepmother, and she's here for a visit, but she can see you're upset and scared. She feels bad for you. Maybe she can help?

(Part 2 of the Evil Stepmommy character set. If you want to meet Mrs. White in my original Milovana tease, go here: https://milovana.com/webteases/showtease.php?id=61159&key=12fb8f535e )
creator: ritewriter
